support@amsterdamfuturelabs.com

Support

We’re here to help

One inbox for everything: support@amsterdamfuturelabs.com. We read every message and aim to reply within two business days.

Email support@amsterdamfuturelabs.com

What can we do for you?

General questions

Anything about the apps, the studio or upcoming releases.

Ask a question

Bug reports

Found something broken? Include your iPhone model, iOS version and what you expected to happen.

Report a bug

Feature requests

Ideas that would make an app better for you. We read every single one.

Suggest a feature

Privacy questions

Questions about how an app handles data — answered personally, in plain language.

Ask about privacy

Support per app

Mention the app in your subject line and we can help you faster.

BreathWell

Breathe better. Feel better.

Email support FAQ Privacy policy

Kamado Companion

Airfryer Companion

Sudoku XL

Meal Planner

Plan smarter. Eat better.

Email support FAQ Privacy policy

A note on purchases & refunds

All purchases are processed by Apple through the App Store. For refunds, visit reportaproblem.apple.com — Apple handles refund requests directly and we never see your payment details.
